# Refine UX/UI for 3270.io terminal-style pages

## When to use
- When modifying hero, product cards, dialog, or footer flows in `src/App.tsx`.
- When adjusting Tailwind classes, spacing, or responsive behavior in `src/main.css` and `src/index.css`.
- When changing terminal-themed visuals (scanlines, glow, typography, animation timing).

## Inputs
- `<goal>`
- `<scope>`
- `<files>`
- `<__filter_complete__></__filter_complete__>`

## Prompt
Implement `<goal>` within `<scope>` for this 3270 terminal-themed landing page. Keep styling consistent with existing green-phosphor/amber accents, monospace emphasis, and shadcn UI primitives. Restrict edits to `<files>` and use `<__filter_complete__></__filter_complete__>` to determine completion.
